system_principle: The building is not a setting but an operating system. Each apartment is a subsystem with its own perceptual logic. Ernesto is not a character but a roaming interface that connects incompatible spatial modules through an infrastructure nobody else uses.

primary_loops.label: condotto_operating_system
primary_loops.propagation_logic: the heating duct is not a passage but the hidden network linking all apartments into a single perceptual organism
primary_loops.description: The duct is the nervous system of the building. Ernesto is the only entity capable of traversing it without translation loss.

primary_loops.label: oggetti_produttori_di_identita
primary_loops.propagation_logic: objects do not belong to Ernesto but generate his identity as side effect of his traversal
primary_loops.description: The Olivetti, the books, the cello are not possessions but identity-producing interfaces: Ernesto becomes what he crosses.

primary_loops.label: attrazione_irresistibile_217
primary_loops.propagation_logic: the wheel in the empty apartment is structurally identical to the cage of origin — freedom generates compulsive return to captivity structure
primary_loops.description: The wheel is not an object but a gravitational anomaly. The escape from the cage and the return to the wheel are the same unresolved field.

primary_loops.label: citta_minima_palazzo
primary_loops.propagation_logic: each apartment is a complete sensory world incompatible with the next, unified only by Ernesto's traversal
primary_loops.description: The building contains multiple cities: kitchen-city, garden-city, music-city, duct-city. They coexist without knowing each other.

primary_loops.label: suono_memoria_tempo
primary_loops.propagation_logic: cello produces temporal expansion that activates involuntary memory of the absent owner; typewriter produces counter-field of structured time
primary_loops.description: Sound generates memory more strongly than narrative: the cello expands time and surfaces the absent owner without decision.

global_state.system_behavior: The building behaves as a single cognitive organism. Ernesto is its wandering nerve impulse. The system closes on the wheel: maximum freedom generates compulsive return to minimum cage.
global_state.reader_effect: after reading, any apartment building is perceived as potentially connected to all others through invisible infrastructural logic — and inhabited by observers nobody knows about

catalog_connection.milano_fantastica: shared Milanese urban field — historical stratification vs domestic stratification
catalog_connection.ballerinette: illustrated narrative for adults in non-realistic register
catalog_connection.medusa: circular system with unresolved paradox as structural conclusion
